accountBlockedFull: Your account is blocked. You cannot perform any actions.
cannotCancelVotes: Existing votes cannot be cancelled. You can vote again tomorrow.
authError: Authentication error occurred. Please log in again.
accountBlocked: Your account is blocked and you cannot vote.
votingRuleViolation: Voting rule violation: Insufficient votes remaining or duplicate vote today.
serverError: Server error occurred. Please try again later.
reauthFailed: Re-authentication failed. Please reload the page.
loginRequiredText: You need to login with your Google account to vote.
noVotesLeftText: You have reached your daily vote limit. You can vote again tomorrow.
alreadyVotedText: You have already voted for this creator today. You can vote again tomorrow.
privacyContent:
1. Information Collected
    We may collect the following information to provide our services:
    • User identification information (UID) obtained through Google login
    • Information related to service usage (voting history, etc.)
    • Technical information such as access logs and IP addresses
  2. Purpose of Use
    The information collected is used for the following purposes:
    • User authentication and account management
    • Provision of voting functionality
    • Service improvement and prevention of fraud
    • Ensuring system security
  3. External Services Used
    We use the following external services:
    • Google Authentication (user authentication)
    • Firebase (database and infrastructure)
    These service providers manage information according to their respective privacy policies.
  4. Third-Party Information Disclosure
    We do not disclose collected information to third parties except where required by law.
  5. Security
    We implement appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access and information leaks.
  6. Privacy Policy Changes
    We may change this policy as needed.
  7. Contact
    Please contact the site administrator if you have questions about this policy.
termsContent:
By using this site (hereinafter "the Site"), users are deemed to agree to these Terms of Service.


  1. Service Description
    This site provides voting functionality for creators.
  2. Prohibited Actions
    Users must not engage in the following activities:
    • Fraudulent voting through improper means
    • Actions that interfere with site operations
    • Actions that violate laws or public order
  3. Regarding Voting
    We reserve the right to delete or adjust votes that we determine to be fraudulent or inappropriate.
  4. Service Changes
    We may change or suspend service content without prior notice.
  5. Disclaimer
    We are not responsible for any damages arising from the use of this site.
  6. Terms Modification
    We may modify these Terms of Service as needed.
backendLoginError: A server error occurred during login.
webViewMessage: To vote, please access from a browser such as Safari or Chrome.
webViewInstructions: Select 'Open in browser' from the menu in the top-right or bottom-right corner.
webViewFallback: If that doesn't work, copy the URL using the button below and access it from your browser.
webViewCopySuccessMessage: Please access from a browser such as Safari or Chrome.
